name: Chocolate Nut Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the shortening and chocolate over low heat. Remove from heat.
2. Add the liquid sweetener, vanilla, and beaten eggs. Stir until well blended.
3. Add the flour and baking soda; mix well.
4. Stir in the chopped nuts.
5. Pour into a greased (or sprayed with Pam) 8-inch cake pan.
6. Bake at 325°F for 20 minutes.
7. Cool, then cut into 30 squares.
Note: Exchange: 2 brownies = 1/2 bread and 1 1/2 cups fat.
